title: Work decomposition — agent brief manifest
description: The structural truth a decomposition must satisfy. A per-object schema can enforce shape; the cross-brief properties (acyclic deps, id uniqueness, coverage, path bounds) are enforced by validate_decomposition.py.

coverage_note.description: How the briefs together fully cover the proposal — the completeness claim the adversarial review will attack.

goal.description: What 'done' looks like, in the reviewer's terms.

scope.description: File/dir globs this brief may touch — the write boundary.

depends_on.description: ids of briefs that must land first.

test_plan.description: How it's verified: which flow fixture / go test / manual check.

agent_brief.description: The self-contained prompt handed to the implementer agent.
